title: Gray's Animal Overhaul
body:
The Animal mobs only version of my [Mob Overhaul Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grays-mob-overhaul)!

Works best for Versions 1.19 -1.20
OptiFine OR ETF/EMF mods Required

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Gray's Animal Overhaul should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
